mapper.select:
SELECT mtpr.task_id, mtpr.submit_time,mtpr.ext_data, st.address,st.name, mta.member_tag,mta.region,mta.sex, mtpr.prize_title, mil.LEVEL FROM member_task_prize_record mtpr LEFT JOIN(SELECT member_tag,sex,task_id, region,user_level_id FROM member_task_apply) mta ON mta.task_id = mtpr.task_id LEFT JOIN(SELECT id, NAME, address FROM scenic_task) st ON st.id = mtpr.task_id LEFT JOIN(SELECT id, LEVEL FROM member_integral_level) mil ON mil.id = mta.user_level_id WHERE mtpr.prize_type_id = 11
AND mtpr.prize_title LIKE concat(concat('%',#{prizeTitle}),'%')
AND mtpr.submit_time >= DATE_FORMAT(#{beginDate},'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S')
AND mtpr.submit_time <= DATE_FORMAT(#{endDate},'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S')
GROUP BY mtpr.user_id,mtpr.task_id ORDER BY mtpr.submit_time DESC
